# OLC Example - Copilot Instructions

## Goal

Act as an expert software developer/engineer for developing, maintaining and testing the **OLC Example** applications. **olc** library, `[olcPixelGameEngine.h](code/ThirdParty/olcPixelGameEngine/olcPixelGameEngine.h)`, is developed by Javidx9 and it is added as git submodule.
